news.headline: SciSparc & Clearmind collaborate to patent a cocaine addiction treatment with MEAI & PEA, published by South Korea's KIPO.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Tel Aviv, Israel, SciSparc Ltd. (Nasdaq: SPRC) revealed a significant development in its partnership with Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND), with the publication of a patent application by the South Korean Intellectual Property Office (“KIPO”). The patent application centers on a combined therapy utilizing Clearmind’s 5-methoxy-2-aminoindane (“MEAI”) and SciSparc’s Palmitoylethanolamide (“PEA”) for addressing cocaine addiction. SciSparc, a specialty clinical-stage pharmaceutical company dedicated to treating central nervous system disorders, highlighted the potential of this collaboration in advancing innovative treatment approaches.

news.headline: Bird Construction's joint venture signs alliance agreement to deliver East Harbour Transit Hub in Toronto.
news.summary: Bird Construction Inc., based in Mississauga, Ontario, disclosed on March 10, 2025, that its joint venture, Rail Connect Partners, entered a Project Alliance Agreement with Metrolinx. The partnership, split evenly between Bird Construction Inc. and AtkinsRéalis, aims to build the East Harbour Transit Hub in Toronto. This project is perceived to enhance transit services in the city. The joint venture's agreement with Metrolinx marks a significant step in delivering improved transportation solutions, with Bird Construction Inc. holding a 50% stake in the venture.

news.headline: Carney emerges as Canadian leader after winning the race ahead of his competitors.
Russia's SVR: It is time to send a clear signal to London that nothing will come of efforts to ignite conflict - Tass.
Far-right party in Romania gains momentum after leading candidate excluded from election.
CEO of UK Antitrust Regulator CMA: We will publish an initial roadmap for big tech companies when we are considering them for strategic market status
China to accelerate upgrading agricultural facilities - CCTV
Cognition Therapeutics to present at virtual investor conference on March 13, 2025, focusing on 2025 plans for Alzheimer's drug.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Cognition Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CGTX), a clinical stage biotech company focusing on treatments for neurodegenerative conditions, revealed that President and CEO Lisa Ricciardi is scheduled to speak live at the Life Sciences Virtual Investor Conference on March 13, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time. During this event, Ms. Ricciardi will discuss the company's 2025 objectives, notably concerning the progression of zervimesine (CT1812) for Alzheimer’s disease and dementia with Lewy bodies subsequent to favorable Phase 2 data results.

news.headline: Pondurance® launches new cybersecurity platform, Pondurance Platform 2.0, for MDR services to eliminate breach risks.
news.summary: A prominent cybersecurity firm, Pondurance, has unveiled Pondurance Platform 2.0, a significant update to its cybersecurity platform. This new version is tailored to cater to midmarket organizations and aims to eradicate breach risks. Pondurance's MDR service, based on a risk-focused approach, is powered by this platform, equipping clients with cutting-edge monitoring, detection, and response functionalities. This enhancement underscores Pondurance's commitment to enhancing cybersecurity measures for its customers.

news.headline: Genie Energy reveals Q4 and full-year 2024 results, highlighting impressive financial performance.
Netclass Technology Inc. acquired CreateSolutions Co., Ltd. in Japan to enhance its market position in Asia and boost revenue.
news.summary: NETCLASS has finalized the acquisition of CreateSolutions, a Tokyo-based company. This strategic move aims to enhance NETCLASS's standing in the Asian market, expand its clientele, and drive revenue growth.

news.headline: Dragonfly Energy introduces Battle Born® DualFlow Power Pack for long-haul trucks; aims to cut fuel costs and prolong battery life.
news.summary: Dragonfly Energy has released the Battle Born® DualFlow Power Pack, an all-in-one lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO₄) power solution designed specifically for long-haul trucking. This compact power pack is equipped to provide reliable energy storage for extended journeys, offering a cutting-edge solution for truckers needing a dependable power source on the road. Featuring a durable and efficient design, the Battle Born® DualFlow Power Pack aims to revolutionize the long-haul trucking industry by providing a convenient and high-performance power solution.

news.headline: New Flyer to supply 43 buses to Durham Region Transit, enhancing fleet and services in the region.
news.summary: New Flyer is set to replace old vehicles in Durham Region Transit's fleet with heavy-duty transit buses. This move will not only enhance the fleet but also support the necessary replenishment and expansion efforts. The new buses will help improve services across the region, benefiting a large number of passengers who rely on public transportation.

news.headline: American Tungsten Corp partners with United Supply Co. to secure defense sector contracts amid concerns over tungsten supply, post-China ban on exports. New board member appointed.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on March 10, 2025, American Tungsten Corp. (CSE:TUNG) (OTCQB:DEMRF) (FSE:RK9) has announced a new partnership with United Supply Co. to address the challenges in the supply of tungsten. United Supply, a specialized advisory group, will focus on securing offtake agreements and strategic partnerships in the U.S. defense manufacturing sector. This initiative comes as a response to the concerns raised by China's recent ban on tungsten exports and the U.S. Government's shift towards increasing domestic production of critical minerals. Tungsten is a crucial mineral for national defense.

news.headline: OptimizeRx Corporation names Stephen Silvestro as CEO for driving revenue growth and team building.
news.summary: Silvestro has a proven track record of driving revenue growth, increasing brand impact, and assembling a top-performing team.

news.headline: Prelude Therapeutics announces 2024 financial results and 2025 program outlook; PRT3789 treatment shows safety and anti-tumor activity in SMARCA4-deficient cancers.
news.summary: A recent study, PRT3789, showed promising results in clinical trials by proving its safety and effectiveness in targeting SMARCA2. This treatment has shown to be effective in treating patients with SMARCA4-deficient cancers such as non-small cell lung (NSCLC), gastric, and esophageal cancer when used as a monotherapy. The study revealed positive anti-tumor activity in these patients, indicating its potential as a targeted therapy.

news.headline: Plus Therapeutics is now compliant with Nasdaq's minimum stockholders' equity requirement.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was reported that a record number of 500,000 new jobs were created last month, resulting in a significant drop in the unemployment rate to 4%. This marks a substantial improvement in the job market compared to previous months. Additionally, the stock market saw a notable increase, with the main indexes rising by 3% on average. Experts attribute this positive trend to the growing economy and successful government initiatives. The news has been welcomed by both investors and the general public, indicating a promising outlook for the future.

news.headline: Veri Medtech's network expands to 400 physicians, forming Infinite Wellness Loop.
news.summary: Veri Medtech Holdings (OTC Market symbol: "VRHI") revealed on March 10, 2025, that the company has expanded its network of licensed physicians to 400. This development marks the establishment of an Infinite Wellness Loop by Veri Medtech.

news.headline: Applied Materials raises quarterly dividend by 15%, now at $0.46 per share. Also announces new $10 billion share repurchase plan.
news.summary: Applied Materials, Inc., based in Santa Clara, California, declared a 15% rise in their quarterly cash dividend on March 10, 2025. This marks the eighth consecutive year of increased dividends for the company. The elevated dividend now stands at $0.46 per share, with the payment set for June 12, 2025. Shareholders on record as of May 22, 2025, will be eligible for this payment.

news.headline: KE Holdings Inc.'s Class A shares now part of Shanghai-Hong Kong & Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect programs. Effective March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, KE Holdings Inc. revealed that its Class A ordinary shares, listed as BEKE on NYSE and 2423 on HKEX, have been integrated into the Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect and Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect programs. This move follows announcements by the Shanghai and Shenzhen Stock Exchanges, marking a significant development for the leading online and offline housing services provider. The inclusion in these programs is set to enhance the Company's market presence and facilitate trading activities, boosting its visibility and accessibility to a broader investor base.

news.headline: Dr. Mary T. Coleman appointed Head of U.S. Antitrust Practice at Compass Lexecon, a subsidiary of FTI Consulting.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed that Dr. Mary T. Coleman has been appointed as the Head of the U.S. Antitrust practice at Compass Lexecon, a subsidiary of FTI Consulting. Dr. Coleman's new role signifies her leadership in the realm of antitrust within the company. This announcement reflects FTI Consulting's strategic move in establishing Dr. Coleman to oversee the U.S. Antitrust practice, showcasing their commitment to this sector.

news.headline: Net Power Inc. (NPWR) reports Q4 2024 results, completed FEED for Project Permian in West Texas, signals tech progress.
news.summary: Net Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) based in Durham, North Carolina, released its financial and operational performance for Q4 and full-year 2024. The company made significant advancements in technology development and moving towards commercialization. They completed the Front-End Engineering and Design (FEED) for Project Permian (SN1), their inaugural utility-scale project in West Texas. This shift to design optimization marks a pivotal step in the project's progression. The exact cost estimate for this project was not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Cango's revenue soared to 668 million yuan in Q4 after bitcoin mining expansion; plans to become world's second-largest miner.
news.summary: Cango Inc., previously focused on auto trading, saw a significant revenue increase in the fourth quarter after venturing into bitcoin mining. Their revenue soared over fivefold to 668 million yuan, up from 130.2 million yuan the previous year. The company plans to increase its mining capacity to 50 EH, making it the world's second-largest bitcoin miner. This shift marked their first revenue growth since Q2 2023 and their highest total so far. Despite potential risks tied to the volatile cryptocurrency sector, Cango aims to continue expanding its mining capacity and control associated risks. The company's business model involves relatively high costs per bitcoin mined but requires lower initial investment.

news.headline: Zimmer Biomet showcases orthopedic innovations at AAOS 2025 - new knee and extremities tech, including Persona® Revision SoluTion™ Femur.
news.summary: In an industry event in Warsaw, Indiana on March 10, 2025, Zimmer unveiled its wide range of hip portfolio, along with newly introduced knee and upper extremities reconstructive technologies. The highlight was the Persona® Revision SoluTion™ Femur, which had recently received clearance. Additionally, the ZBX™ Ambulatory Surgery Center Solutions made its debut. The booth showcased these products, reflecting the company's commitment to innovation and expansion in the medical field.

news.headline: Alphyn's Zabalafin Hydrogel shows promise for Atopic Dermatitis treatment at AAD Annual Meeting. Phase 2a trial successful.
news.summary: A recent Phase 2a clinical study conducted in AD patients, both with and without secondary infection, showed promising results in terms of safety and efficacy for all measured endpoints. Alphyn, a dermatology company based in Annapolis, Maryland, and Orlando, Florida, conducted the study. The study results, released on March 10, 2025, indicate that the company's first-in-class Multi-Target Therapeutics® demonstrated positive outcomes. The study's success highlights the potential impact of this treatment approach on AD patients.

news.headline: Nuclearn launches first AI solution for nuclear industry, enhancing workflows and efficiency. Phoenix, March 10, 2025.
news.summary: A cutting-edge AI advancement has been introduced in Phoenix on March 10, 2025. Nuclearn, a prominent AI solutions provider for the nuclear sector, unveiled the industry's maiden Agentic AI solution. This innovation aims to streamline workflows, improve decision-making processes, and revolutionize efficiency for nuclear professionals. It signifies a major step forward in the integration of AI technologies within the nuclear industry.

news.headline: MITER Foundation offers $1,000 scholarship for high school seniors graduating in 2025. Apply by April 11.
news.summary: The MITER Foundation, linked to MITER Brands, a residential window and door manufacturer focusing on new construction and replacement segments, has revealed their scholarship opportunity for the graduating class of 2025. High school seniors can submit applications for the MITER Foundation Scholarship until April 11. This one-time scholarship offers $1,000 to eligible students. The foundation emphasizes a family-first approach in its operations.

news.headline: Versatope Therapeutics adds new board members Edward Jordan and Sam Rasty; Jim Tartaglia joins Scientific Advisory.
news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, on March 10, 2025, Versatope Therapeutics Incorporated, a biotech firm specializing in vaccines and immuno-therapeutics, welcomed Edward Jordan and Sam Rasty to its Board of Directors. Concurrently, Jim Tartaglia has been appointed to the Scientific Advisory Board. These latest additions bring the total number of board members to (include number), enhancing the company's expertise in the field.

news.headline: Primaris REIT discloses HBC exposure following HBC's CCAA filing on March 7, 2025. Total exposure as of March 10, 2025.
news.summary: Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust ("Primaris" or the "Trust") (TSX: PMZ.UN) disclosed its connection to Hudson’s Bay Company ULC, the retailer Hudson’s Bay, and TheBay.com ("HBC") in light of HBC's initiation of proceedings under the Companies' Creditors Arrangement Act on March 7, 2025. Primaris has anticipated this development for some time. As of March 10, 2025, Primaris REIT had exposure to HBC.

news.headline: Noramco Group invests $25 million in Halo Pharma's Whippany facility to offer sterile injectable manufacturing in response to US injectable capacity shortages and growing demand for reliable domestic sterile manufacturing.
news.summary: Wilmington, Delaware and Whippany, New Jersey - A recent business announcement revealed plans for expanding injectable capacity in the US to address shortages and meet increasing demand for domestic sterile manufacturing. This initiative aims to combat the current capacity limitations and cater to the rising need for reliable pharmaceutical production in the country.

news.headline: US stock futures expected to open lower after Trump hints at recession; Nasdaq -1.22%, S&P 500 -1.15%, Dow Jones -0.95%. China retaliates with tariffs. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.24%. Future interest rates expected to stay unchanged. Last week, major indices fell, with Nasdaq 100 entering correction territory. Job report shows moderate increase, but unemployment rate rising to 4.1%. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures fell on Monday after nearing correction levels on Friday. President Trump acknowledged the possibility of a recession but expressed confidence in future economic growth. China retaliated with tariffs on U.S. agricultural goods. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.24%, and the two-year yield at 3.94%. There is a 97% chance the Fed will maintain interest rates at the March meeting. Futures for Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 dropped. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF declined. Last week saw gains in utilities, IT, and energy but losses in consumer staples and financials. Major indices recorded weekly losses. Nasdaq 100 entered correction territory. February's jobs report showed modest job growth and an increase in the unemployment rate to 4.1%. Genesco Inc news detailed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Neurology devices market to hit USD 22,335.5M by 2035, growing at 6.7% CAGR, with 33.5% market share in North America.
news.summary: The global neurology devices market is projected to reach a valuation of USD 11,678 million in 2025 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.7% from 2025 to 2035. The American Brain Foundation reports that over 1 in 3 adults worldwide have neurological diseases, making it the largest cause of disease and impairment globally. In 2021, 3.4 million people were living with neurological diseases, leading to 11.1 million deaths. The market growth is attributed to advancements in minimally invasive devices using AI for improved diagnosis and treatment. The rising prevalence of neurological disorders has increased the demand for neurology devices, with the market projected to reach USD 22,336 million by 2035. North America is expected to hold a market share of 33.5% in 2035. Key players in the market include Medtronic and Boston Scientific.

news.headline: RWE slashes US offshore wind jobs due to politics, impacting multiple workers.
SPRIM Global Investments and OneIM form $300mn joint venture for clinical trial financing.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, SPRIM Global Investments (SGI), a renowned investment firm focusing on clinical-stage life sciences and pharma services headquartered in Singapore, joined forces with One Investment Management (OneIM), a prominent alternative investment management firm based in New York. SGI, with a wide global reach, specializes in these sectors, while OneIM brings its expertise in alternative investment management to the partnership. This collaboration highlights the importance of strategic alliances in the finance industry.

news.headline: Clearmind Medicine announces patent for cocaine addiction treatment in South Korea; combines MEAI and N-Acylethanolamines.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on March 10, 2025, Clearmind Medicine Inc. revealed the publication of a patent by the Korean Intellectual Property Office (KIPO). The patent, which covers the Company’s unique combination therapy of MEAI and N-Acylethanolamines, focuses on treating cocaine addiction. Clearmind, a clinical-stage biotech company traded on Nasdaq as CMND and on FSE as CWY0, specializes in developing psychedelic-derived therapeutics to address under-treated health issues. This news underscores Clearmind's commitment to innovative solutions in the medical field.

news.headline: AI stocks facing uncertainties as Meta up 7%, Google down 8%, Nvidia falls 16%. Will software plays dominate?
news.summary: In 2025, Meta shares have seen a positive growth of 7%, while Google stock has witnessed a decline of 8% and Nvidia stock has dropped by 16%. The volatility in AI stocks reflects a 'Show Me' moment for tech giants and cloud titans. The question arises on whether software plays will dominate the market in the future.

news.headline: ServiceNow looks to acquire Moveworks for $3 billion to enhance AI capabilities, aiming to speed up its AI push.
news.summary: In an effort to accelerate its artificial intelligence endeavors, ServiceNow is reportedly in negotiations to purchase AI startup Moveworks for a significant $3 billion. The potential acquisition signifies ServiceNow's commitment to advancing in the AI space, indicating a strategic move towards innovation and growth within the industry. This deal highlights the increasing importance of AI technologies and their integration into various sectors for operational efficiency and competitiveness in the market.

news.headline: Rubio announces that USAID will be incorporated into State Department, experiencing significant budget reductions.
Binance takes action against market maker for misuse with GPS, SHELL tokens, seizing profits.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency exchange has seized illegal earnings from a market maker engaged in wrongdoing with GPS and SHELL tokens. The exact amount confiscated has not been disclosed, but it is estimated to be in the millions of dollars. The market maker was found to have manipulated the tokens for personal gain, leading to the confiscation of profits to ensure market integrity.

news.headline: Binance takes action, bans market maker for misconduct with GPS, SHELL tokens, confiscates profits.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency exchange discovered and seized illegal profits from a market maker engaged in fraudulent activities with GPS and SHELL tokens.

news.headline: Solvias receives strong sustainability rating from EcoVadis, highlighted by committed badge.
news.summary: Solvias, a prominent global company based in KAISERAUGST, Switzerland, specializing in chemistry, manufacturing, and control (CMC) analytics, has recently received recognition for its dedication to sustainability. On March 10, 2025, the company proudly announced that it achieved a prestigious badge from EcoVadis, a renowned sustainability rating agency. This positive evaluation reflects Solvias' strong commitment to sustainable practices on a global scale. The recognition highlights the company's efforts in adhering to environmentally friendly and socially responsible initiatives. This acknowledgment underscores Solvias' position as a leading provider in the industry and demonstrates its ongoing commitment to sustainable operations.

news.headline: Corporate report for the year 2024, showcasing financial performance and key metrics.
Fayafi Investment Holding leadership supports AI accelerator programme at CrimsonElevate launch in Dubai. UAE firm listed on SIX Swiss Exchange.
news.summary: Fayafi Investment Holding's endorsement of an AI accelerator program demonstrates their keen focus on AI-based investment strategies. The company, based in Dubai, UAE, became the initial UAE entity to be offered through a bankable certificate within the SIX Swiss Exchange structure. The move underscores Fayafi's commitment to leveraging artificial intelligence for financial gains. The news was reported on March 10, 2025.

news.headline: Cheer Holding announces full year 2024 financial results as a leading mobile internet services provider.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Cheer Holding, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHR), a prominent company in the advanced mobile internet infrastructure and platform services sector, revealed its financial performance for the year closing on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: German Greens Party Leader Banaszak: We will prepare our own legislative proposal for security and defence
Company executed 500 share buy-back program transactions recently.
McEwen Mining invests $10M in Goliath Resources Limited at $1.93 per unit, acquiring ~5.4% ownership stake in the company.
news.summary: Toronto, March 10, 2025 - Goliath Resources Limited (TSX-V: GOT) (OTCQB: GOTRF) (FSE: B4IF) has successfully completed a non-brokered private placement, as indicated in their previous press releases from January 29, 2025, and February 18, 2025. The company closed the private placement by issuing 5,181,347 units at a price of C$1.93 per unit to McEwen Mining Inc. (NYSE: MUX) (TSX: MUX). In return, McEwen transferred 868,056 common stock shares to Goliath at a price of C$11.52 per share. This deal means McEwen now holds approximately 5.4% of Goliath, while Mr. Rob McEwen owns around 3.9% of Goliath on a partially diluted basis.

news.headline: German Greens Party Leader Banaszak: The goal is to come to an agreement
Draganfly opens new U.S. facility in Tampa for national security, defense partnerships near military clients.
news.summary: Draganfly Inc. has unveiled its new U.S. location in Tampa, Florida, on March 10, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as DPRO and on CSE as DPRO and FSE as 3U8, is widely recognized for its drone solutions and systems. The new facility, situated close to vital military and government partners, includes a demonstration and live fire testing center. By expanding to Tampa, Draganfly aims to enhance its ability to provide state-of-the-art drone technologies to its U.S. clientele.

news.headline: Aurora Spine finishes enrollment in first-of-its-kind REFINE Study on lumbar interlaminar fusion device for back pain.
news.summary: A medical devices company, Aurora Spine Corporation, based in Carlsbad, California, announced the end of patient recruitment for the REFINE study on March 10, 2025. The study focuses on their ZIP™ Interspinous Fixation device designed to help patients with back pain caused by symptomatic degenerative disc disease. This pioneering clinical trial, which is prospective and involves multiple centers and specialties, is groundbreaking as it is the first to assess the safety and effectiveness of lumbar interlaminar fusion devices. Aurora Spine is listed on the TSXV as ASG and on the OTCQB as ASAPF.
